name: Data Ingestion - Jager OLAP (Postgres to Motherduck)

parameters.query:
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio;
CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_buffer;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_posts (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  content TEXT,
  url VARCHAR(2048),
  published_at TIMESTAMP,
  fetched_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_post_analytics (
  post_id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  impressions INTEGER,
  likes INTEGER,
  comments INTEGER,
  shares INTEGER,
  clicks INTEGER,
  saves INTEGER,
  sends INTEGER,
  fetched_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_account_analytics (
  account_id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  platform VARCHAR(50),
  username VARCHAR(255),
  impressions INTEGER,
  members_reached INTEGER,
  reactions INTEGER,
  comments INTEGER,
  reshares INTEGER,
  post_saves INTEGER,
  post_sends INTEGER,
  fetched_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_follower_stats_timeline (
  account_id VARCHAR(255),
  date DATE,
  followers_count INTEGER,
  growth INTEGER,
  growth_percentage DECIMAL(5,2),
  fetched_at TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (account_id, date)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_post_timeline (
  post_id VARCHAR(255),
  date DATE,
  impressions INTEGER,
  reach INTEGER,
  likes INTEGER,
  comments INTEGER,
  shares INTEGER,
  saves INTEGER,
  clicks INTEGER,
  views INTEGER,
  fetched_at TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (post_id, date)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_content_decay (
  platform VARCHAR(50),
  bucket_order INTEGER,
  bucket_label VARCHAR(50),
  avg_pct_of_final DECIMAL(5,2),
  post_count INTEGER,
  fetched_at TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (platform, bucket_order)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_buffer.channels (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255),
  service VARCHAR(100),
  organization_id VARCHAR(255),
  active BOOLEAN,
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_buffer.posts (
  id VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
  text TEXT,
  channel_id VARCHAR(255),
  due_at TIMESTAMP,
  status VARCHAR(50),
  assets VARCHAR,
  metrics VARCHAR,
  reactions INTEGER,
  comments INTEGER,
  shares INTEGER,
  reposts INTEGER,
  clicks INTEGER,
  reach INTEGER,
  impressions INTEGER,
  views INTEGER,
  engagement_rate DECIMAL(10,2),
  created_at TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP,
  processed INTEGER
);

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_posts (id, content, url, published_at, fetched_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.content ? $json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}', '{{ $json.url }}', '{{ $json.published_at }}', '{{ $json.fetched_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  url = EXCLUDED.url,
  published_at = EXCLUDED.published_at,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_post_analytics (post_id, impressions, likes, comments, shares, clicks, saves, sends, fetched_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.post_id }}', {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.clicks }}, {{ $json.saves }}, {{ $json.sends }}, '{{ $json.fetched_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (post_id) DO UPDATE SET
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  sends = EXCLUDED.sends,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_account_analytics (account_id, platform, username, impressions, members_reached, reactions, comments, reshares, post_saves, post_sends, fetched_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.account_id }}', '{{ $json.platform }}', '{{ $json.username }}', {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.members_reached }}, {{ $json.reactions }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.reshares }}, {{ $json.post_saves }}, {{ $json.post_sends }}, '{{ $json.fetched_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (account_id) DO UPDATE SET
  platform = EXCLUDED.platform,
  username = EXCLUDED.username,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  members_reached = EXCLUDED.members_reached,
  reactions = EXCLUDED.reactions,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  reshares = EXCLUDED.reshares,
  post_saves = EXCLUDED.post_saves,
  post_sends = EXCLUDED.post_sends,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_follower_stats_timeline (account_id, date, followers_count, growth, growth_percentage, fetched_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.account_id }}', '{{ $json.date }}', {{ $json.followers_count }}, {{ $json.growth }}, {{ $json.growth_percentage }}, '{{ $json.fetched_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (account_id, date) DO UPDATE SET
  followers_count = EXCLUDED.followers_count,
  growth = EXCLUDED.growth,
  growth_percentage = EXCLUDED.growth_percentage,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_post_timeline (post_id, date, impressions, reach, likes, comments, shares, saves, clicks, views, fetched_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.post_id }}', '{{ $json.date }}', {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.likes }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.saves }}, {{ $json.clicks }}, {{ $json.views }}, '{{ $json.fetched_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (post_id, date) DO UPDATE SET
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  reach = EXCLUDED.reach,
  likes = EXCLUDED.likes,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  saves = EXCLUDED.saves,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  views = EXCLUDED.views,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_zernio.linkedin_content_decay (platform, bucket_order, bucket_label, avg_pct_of_final, post_count, fetched_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.platform }}', {{ $json.bucket_order }}, '{{ $json.bucket_label }}', {{ $json.avg_pct_of_final }}, {{ $json.post_count }}, '{{ $json.fetched_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (platform, bucket_order) DO UPDATE SET
  bucket_label = EXCLUDED.bucket_label,
  avg_pct_of_final = EXCLUDED.avg_pct_of_final,
  post_count = EXCLUDED.post_count,
  fetched_at = EXCLUDED.fetched_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_buffer.channels (id, name, service, organization_id, active, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.name ? $json.name.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}', '{{ $json.service }}', '{{ $json.organization_id }}', {{ $json.active }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}', '{{ $json.updated_at }}')
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  name = EXCLUDED.name,
  service = EXCLUDED.service,
  organization_id = EXCLUDED.organization_id,
  active = EXCLUDED.active,
  created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at;

INSERT INTO {{ $env.MOTHERDUCK_DATABASE || 'staging' }}.s_buffer.posts (id, text, channel_id, due_at, status, assets, metrics, reactions, comments, shares, reposts, clicks, reach, impressions, views, engagement_rate, created_at, updated_at, processed)
VALUES ('{{ $json.id }}', '{{ $json.text ? $json.text.replace(/'/g, "''") : "" }}', '{{ $json.channel_id }}', '{{ $json.due_at }}', '{{ $json.status }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.assets) }}', '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metrics) }}', {{ $json.reactions }}, {{ $json.comments }}, {{ $json.shares }}, {{ $json.reposts }}, {{ $json.clicks }}, {{ $json.reach }}, {{ $json.impressions }}, {{ $json.views }}, {{ $json.engagement_rate }}, '{{ $json.created_at }}', '{{ $json.updated_at }}', {{ $json.processed }})
ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET
  text = EXCLUDED.text,
  channel_id = EXCLUDED.channel_id,
  due_at = EXCLUDED.due_at,
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  assets = EXCLUDED.assets,
  metrics = EXCLUDED.metrics,
  reactions = EXCLUDED.reactions,
  comments = EXCLUDED.comments,
  shares = EXCLUDED.shares,
  reposts = EXCLUDED.reposts,
  clicks = EXCLUDED.clicks,
  reach = EXCLUDED.reach,
  impressions = EXCLUDED.impressions,
  views = EXCLUDED.views,
  engagement_rate = EXCLUDED.engagement_rate,
  created_at = EXCLUDED.created_at,
  updated_at = EXCLUDED.updated_at,
  processed = EXCLUDED.processed;
